TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Winston_Bennett, title = Winston_Bennett, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Winston_Bennett} }

S.FORM: Winston Bennett sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1965, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 2, Winston Bennett, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Winston Bennett sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1965, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 2, Winston Bennett, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: wins~ɕton βennett s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, wins~ɕton βennett, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
